title: Show member icons on collapsed abstraction nodes
description: Collapsed zone/subgraph representative nodes now render all available icons from their contained components and grow to fit the icon grid.
decision_notes: Abstraction projection stores provider/kind icon references for every contained component.
Icon resolution returns a repeated icon list for abstraction nodes, so duplicate component icons are not collapsed away.
SVG abstraction nodes render member icons in a compact grid; symbol definitions remain deduplicated.
Layout grows abstraction nodes based on contained component count so icons have room instead of clipping.
3D keeps using a representative first icon for now; the full icon grid is a 2D SVG abstraction-node affordance.
verification: Browser check at http://127.0.0.1:4174/: closing gcp rendered three abstraction icons inside zone:gcp and grew the node to 204x128.
